heading: Limitation on payments
label: 3839aa–7 Limitation on payments
text: Not including payments made under , a person or legal entity may not receive, directly or indirectly, cost-share or incentive payments under this subpart that, in aggregate, exceed $450,000 for all contracts entered into under this subpart by the person or legal entity during the period of fiscal years 2014 through 2018, or the period of fiscal years 2019 through 2023, regardless of the number of contracts entered into under this subpart by the person or legal entity.section 3839aa–2(j) of this title
notes: Codificationand made identical amendments to this section. The amendments by were repealed by .Pub. L. 110–234Pub. L. 110–246Pub. L. 110–234section 4(a) of Pub. L. 110–246

Prior ProvisionsA prior section 3839aa–7, , as added , , , related to limitation on payments, prior to the general amendment of this part by .Pub. L. 99–198, title XII, § 1240GPub. L. 104–127, title III, § 334110 Stat. 1001Pub. L. 107–171Apr. 4, 1996

Amendments2018—, substituted “Not including payments made under , a person” for “A person” and inserted “or the period of fiscal years 2019 through 2023,” after “2018,”.Pub. L. 115–334, § 2306section 3839aa–2(j) of this title, substituted “this subpart” for “this part” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 115–334, § 2301(d)(1)(I)2014— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section related to limitation on payments and included waiver authority in the case of contracts for projects of special environmental significance as determined by the Secretary.Pub. L. 113–792008—, designated existing provisions as subsec. (a), inserted heading, substituted “Subject to subsection (b), a person or legal entity” for “An individual or entity” and “$300,000” for “$450,000”, substituted “the person” for “the individual” in two places, and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 110–246, § 25082006— substituted “any six-year period” for “the period of fiscal years 2002 through 2007”.Pub. L. 109–1712004— inserted “(excluding funding arrangements with federally recognized Native American Indian Tribes or Alaska Native Corporations under )” after “2007,”.Pub. L. 108–447section 3839aa–2(h) of this title
